summary: Base W8 — scheduled −30% deload (~14 mpw) and the first week under the v4.3 mileage reshape (peak 38→28 mpw; all quality preserved, Adj #67). Run volume cut, quality held: Tue 3×6 @ T is the only hard run; Mon/Thu easy, Fri easy + strides, Sat 45 min long. Two reactive tendons drive the posture — L Achilles AM-stiff (Adj #63), R patellar (Adj #64): lean into the deload, Vomero on all easy/long runs, hill strides held (Adj #44), and HOLD the W9 step-up until BOTH tendons read AM-clean (Adj #65/#67 reopen at the W8→W9 boundary). Lifts unchanged in schedule but the 2026-06-08 audit (Adj #68/#69) lands this week: side delts / biceps / triceps move to the growth band (Wed DB lat→6, preacher/pushdown→4 each), Sat side-delt now DB lateral (load to establish, Adj #69), abs now decline crunch BW (Adj #66), Sat DB flye cut. Incline AMRAP/TM re-test due Wed (last AMRAP W4 → TM 165), against a standing 145 repeat (miss #1, Adj #47). Calf 335 still held (Achilles).

days.note: Truly easy, flat Z1, Vomero Plus. No strides (deload + hill strides held, §11.B / Adj #44). Both tendons reactive — revert to rest on a red/walking-pain AM (§11.C).

Quality day — unchanged by the v4.3 cut. Hold 8:00/mi (confirmed legit T, Adj #26; ran quick W7 = may have room, watch but don't recalibrate before W12). Run-only (§2.A default ordering resumes W8, Adj #53).

Incline: AMRAP/TM re-test due (last W4 → TM 165) vs the standing 145 repeat (miss #1, §5, Adj #47/#27). Audit bumps land (Adj #68): DB lat 6×12 @ 30, preacher 4×10 @ 60 (hold-until-clean), pushdown 4×12 @ 55 (hold-until-clean), decline crunch BW 3×12 (new, Adj #66).
Recovery aerobic (trimmed, deload). Revert to rest on a yellow/red AM (§11.C). Vomero, flat, easy.
Deload — no VO2max yet (Base). Flat strides only (hill strides held, Adj #44); carry the cadence cap (≤180 spm, ~6:00/mi, Adj #25 — nailed clean W7 Fri).

Long trimmed to 45 (deload), flat, Vomero. Hyp B audit (Adj #68/#69): bump lat 155 (#55) + chest-supp row 90 (#56); ESTABLISH new Sat DB lateral ~25–30 (#69); preacher 4×12 / pushdown 4×15 holds; decline crunch BW 3×10 (new); calf OWED (skipped W7) — keep 325 controlled, 335 still held until AM-clean Achilles (#40/#61); DB flye cut.

Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1, daily SI prehab. Walking fine. W8→W9 boundary: recheck BOTH tendons (AM Achilles + R patellar) — clean = W9 step-up proceeds; still reactive = repeat a deload-level week (Adj #65/#67).
